title: Error creating collection from REST API
symptom: When attempting to create a collection from a REST API endpoint, the error 'Cannot read properties of null (reading 'reduce')' is displayed.
applies_when: Using REST API to create a collection
Data is fetched successfully from the endpoint
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The error occurs because WeWeb requires REST API calls to be made over HTTPS. If an HTTP endpoint is used, the data may not be processed correctly, leading to null values and subsequent errors when trying to manipulate the data.
fix_steps: Change the REST API endpoint from HTTP to HTTPS
Retry creating the collection using the updated endpoint
agent_instruction: Ensure the REST API endpoint is using HTTPS and try creating the collection again.
